title: cxxrtl: fix crashes caused by a floating or constant clock input

features.name: constant wire used as clock in posedge always block
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned a constant value used as a clock signal in an always @(posedge) block

features.name: unconnected floating wire used as clock
features.description: Code should include an unconnected floating wire used as a clock signal in an always @(posedge) block
